---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that is broken or not working as expected
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what is wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, logs, or screenshots if relevant.

## Environment

- OS: <!-- e.g. macOS 15.1, Ubuntu 24.04, iOS 18.0, Android 14 -->
- Flutter version: <!-- output of `flutter --version` -->
- Shellbrick version: <!-- e.g. 0.1.0 or commit hash -->
- Auth method: <!-- password / private key / SSH agent -->

## Additional context

Any other context that might help reproduce or fix the issue.
